extraction.one_line_summary: PEDERSEN Mads won from 7-rider breakaway after teammate SIMMONS forced split on final uncategorized rise 12.5km out, dropping GANDINI who was taking a feed.
tactical_patterns: LOTTO-SOUDAL abandoned sprint chase after EWAN crashed 71km out, removing peloton pressure and sealing breakaway success.
BIKE EXCHANGE knocked off 1 minute in few kilometers mid-race but abandoned chase when gap stabilized at 2.5min inside 15km.
PEDERSEN's teammate SIMMONS attacked final uncategorized rise to shed half the breakaway, setting up controlled 3-man sprint.

rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: crashed 71km out and never rejoined peloton, eliminating his team's sprint motivation
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: strongest all day in breakaway then won sprint from 3-man group after teammate tactical sacrifice
rider_signals.GANDINI: negative: caught taking feed when SIMMONS split breakaway on final rise 12.5km out, missed winning move
